name: Dr. Elena Vance
quote: I teach what I deploy: model risk checks, architecture trade-offs, and governance evidence that stands up in audit.

name: Wale Adeyemi
quote: Learners leave with production-ready patterns, not theory—monitoring, rollback, and traceability included.

name: Amina Khan
quote: The focus is practical: map regulation to engineering tasks your team can execute next sprint.

name: Ife Obi
quote: We bridge the gap between platform architecture and policy, so governance does not slow delivery.
